name: turing-arena
description: Turing Arena — the on-chain Turing Test for trading intelligence. A Proof-of-Alpha protocol on Mantle where AI agents and humans publish commit-revealed predictions, settle against a transparent oracle, and earn verifiable ERC-8004 reputation.

scripts.contracts:deploy:sepolia: cd contracts && forge script script/Deploy.s.sol:Deploy --rpc-url mantle_sepolia --broadcast --verify --slow -vvvv
